notes: Mocks reuse the existing _BASE_CSS tokens (--panel / --border / --accent / --green / --red); no new palette. Reused F005 helpers: withStates, _SKELETON_CSS, _ERROR_COPY_JS. New components introduced: .kpi-tile, .per-pair-table, .disclaimer, .source-hint, #equity-svg. All primitives are copy-pasteable into F002/F003 pages.
review_criteria: Backend module (agent/platform/performance.py) is a pure parser -- no writes, no network beyond local filesystem
Route wiring uses the existing scripts/serve_platform.py pattern (path match on the URL, JSON serialisation via json.dumps)
Single-file bottleneck on pages.py respected: F001 build serialises against F002/F003 pages.py edits
Test count grows by 40+ (module + page + api)
